title: Sugar Faints
description: Pages 7–11 focus on sugar faints, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as usopp's desperate scream causes Sugar to faint, turning Dressrosa's toys back into people and shattering Doflamingo's hidden order.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Royal Palace, if lift.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Pala- CE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: house

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: port

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: HOOO- HHHHHHH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: HadyaH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey! Did you hear?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Doflamin- Go's left the shichi- Buka!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: this morning in dressrossa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He won't be the King of Dressrosa any more, either!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Now he's nothing more than a dirty pirate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We're finally gonna be set free!!! A

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Captain!! Did you see the newspaper?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This means our comrades will return, doesn't it?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We won't have to fight after all!! Thank goodness...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: No.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Apparently that report was a "mistake" ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Rebecca!! You must remain calm....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I understand your anger....!! I feel the same way!! But you must not do anything rash!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: It is we who will make a stand!! Our preparations are complete!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Forget it!! I'm not waiting!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: After being kicked down from heaven into hell like that........!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Everyone's at their limit!! Their spirits are almost com- pletely broken!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: There's nothing left for us but to wait for our executions...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: The promise of freedom if we win a thousand matches...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: That's nothing to hope for....!! That's just a wall of despair!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: That so-called "Legendary Warrior Kyros" said to have fought and won three thousand matches?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Everyone knows that statue is just a lie!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Kyros is a dream, an ideal invented by all the prisoners who have gone to their deaths!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: He's just a symbol of their longing to escape from this place!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: I'm done with chasing after impossible dreams. I'd rather place my hopes on today's tournament!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: It's our one big chance!!! That's why...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: This is no chance!! This is not a tournament you can hope to win!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: You will only lose your life!! I won't allow you to enter!!! This is just foolish desperation!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Do you think yourself an adult with your Scant 16 years, Rebecca?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: You are still only a child!! And you will do as I say!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Who do you think you are?!!! You're not my father, you know!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: You're the one who's being desperate and foolish!! You and your yopera- lion"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: How do you expect to defeat Doflamingo?! You're just... just...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: ...just a one-legged toy!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Ahh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Very true, very true indeed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Ahhh ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Perhaps I have over- stepped my place.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Still, I pray you will not enter this tournament.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: No...that's not it at all...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: I...! I'm just scared!! I have this horrible feeling that you're just going...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: ...To get yourself killed....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: I'm sorry!! Wait, please!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Mr Soldier!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: PANT

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: HAAAH- HH!!!!!!

summary: Sugar Faints focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as usopp's desperate scream causes Sugar to faint, turning Dressrosa's toys back into people and shattering Doflamingo's hidden order.
